title: Monitor and merge 100 Visual Docs Bot PRs
description: Track the 100 pull requests created by Visual Docs Bot deployment, ensure CI passes, get reviews, and coordinate merging across all repos
result: Built complete PR monitoring infrastructure: (1) pr-monitor.sh - real-time status checker across 100 repos, (2) pr-auto-merge.sh - safe auto-merge with dry-run mode, (3) PR_MONITORING_REPORT.md - comprehensive status report. Current status: 98 PRs monitored, 1 ready to merge, 92 CI pending, 5 with pre-existing failures. Auto-merge system ready for execution when CI completes.
